title: Kahhori
content:
{{CharHub|Kahhori|Kahhori}} {{AltUniverse|the "[[Tesseract Powered Kahhori Universe]]"|3=Characters|4=1}} {{Character |image = Kahhori.jpg |real name = Kahhori{{Ref|WI206}} |alias = {{Alias |nicknames = Reshaper of Worlds{{Ref|KRoW}}
Witch{{Ref|WI206}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|HAU}} |gender = Female |affiliation = [[Mohawk]]
[[Guardians of the Multiverse]] |tv series = ''[[What If...?]]'' (4 episodes) |comic = ''[[Kahhori: Reshaper of Worlds]]'' |game = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[What If...? – An Immersive Story]]'' (depiction)}}}} |voice actor = [[Devery Jacobs]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|You... All of you, you've been away from the bones of your [[Mohawk|ancestors]] for too long. The [[Forbidden Lake|waters]] sent you here. The spirit in this [[Sky World|land]] made you strong. Gave you gifts. But you've gotten too comfortable. You've forgotten your origins. But I can't. Not when our people are hurting.{{Ref|Mohawk}}|Kahhori to [[Sky World]]ers|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} '''Kahhori''' is a young [[Mohawk]] woman whose village was [[Attack on the Akwesasne Village|attacked]] by the [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]]. She fell into the [[Tesseract]]-imbued waters of the [[Forbidden Lake]] and was transported to the [[Sky World]], where she gained supernatural abilities. With the help of [[Atahraks]] and the Sky World inhabitants, Kahhori traveled back to her home and managed to [[Rescue of the Mohawk Tribesmen|save]] her people from the Spanish Empire and [[Skirmish at the Spanish Royal Court|confronted]] Queen [[Isabella I of Spain|Isabella I]] herself. She was later captured by [[Strange Supreme|Doctor Strange]] who sought to resurrect his [[Corrupted Doctor Strange Universe|universe]] by feeding her and his other prisoners to the [[Forge]]. Kahhori managed to escape and joined forces with [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]] to [[Battle at the Sanctum Infinitum|stop]] Strange once and for all. After they succeeded, [[Watcher]] returned Kahhori to her universe. Kahhori later joined the [[Guardians of the Multiverse]] under Carter's leadership. ==Biography== {{MD|Kahhori (Earth-43166)}} ===Life as a Mohawk=== ====Fascination with the Forbidden Lake==== [[File:Kahhori First Scene.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori spies on the elders]] {{Quote|We're not supposed to go near the old battlefield. The elders said so! This place is cursed."
"It's cursed because no one cleansed it after all the bloodshed.{{Ref|Mohawk}}|[[Wáhta]] and Kahhori|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} Kahhori was a young [[Mohawk]] woman who grew up with her brother, [[Wáhta]], in [[Akwesasne]]. As they grew up, they heard stories of the "[[Forbidden Lake]]", which was located in the mountain but was deserted because of a war between tribes that took place long ago. One day, Kahhori was playing around and got on top of one of the huts in her village in order to spy on the elders, who were cooking food. When she figured they were occupied enough, Kahhori jumped down and commanded Wáhta to follow her as she wanted to visit the Forbidden Lake. [[File:Kahhori and Wàhta.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori and [[Wáhta]] arrive at the battlegrounds]] The two ran through the forest as Wáhta struggled to keep up. Upon hearing him calling for her, Kahhori stopped for a moment, then started back up again. They finally made it to the top of the mountain where Wáhta collapsed of exhaustion. He asked for water, but a now worried Kahhori said she would not drink anything nearby as there was a skeleton greeting them. Upon seeing this, Wáhta warned Kahhori that the old battlefield was cursed and forbidden. Kahhori simply stated that that was because it was never cleansed after the battle. [[File:Forbidden Ducks.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori makes a conclusion of the fake lake]] As the two continued walking, Kahhori explained that the so-called "Forbidden Lake" could take them to the [[Sky World]] and legend had it that the past battles were for the lake. Kahhori stated that it should have brought them together instead. With excitement, the two reached the lake but were left underwhelmed. Kahhori assured Wáhta that the lake could not be the one they were after as it did not seem forbidden at all. Suddenly, a gunshot rang through the forest.{{Ref|WI206}} ====[[Attack on the Akwesasne Village]]==== [[File:Kahhori and Wàhta See Fire.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori and [[Wáhta]] hide from the [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]]]] {{Quote|The elders were wrong... that lake was..."
"A decoy lake. With decoy ducks.{{Ref|Mohawk}}|Kahhori and [[Wáhta]]|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} The gunshots continued as Kahhori realized what they were. The duo ran to the village only to find parts of it in flames. Hiding in the tall grass, the siblings watched as the [[Spain|Spanish]] [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]] rounded people up. Suddenly, the head Conquistador, [[Rodrigo Gonzolo]] spotted them, forcing the siblings to run away. As gunshots barely missed them, Kahhori and Wáhta made it back to the top of the mountain and into the cursed forest. [[File:What If...? Trailer (66).png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori falls into the [[Forbidden Lake]]]] However, the ground came out from under them as the duo fell into a hidden cave. Upon getting up, they were met with a blue glow: they were at the actual Forbidden Lake. As the Spanish Conquistadores fell in, the siblings hid. However, Wáhta made a sound, causing a conquistador to walk towards him. Seeing this, Kahhori threw a rock at the man. This allowed Wáhta try to fight for the conquistador's weapon. Suddenly, another conquistador, [[Luis (Conquistador)|Luis]] arrived and shot Kahhori. The bullet pierced her shoulder, causing her to fall into the lake. As Kahhori sank, the [[Tesseract]] at the bottom of the lake transported her to the Sky World.{{Ref|WI206}} ===Sky World=== ====Newfound Powers==== [[File:Kahhori New Day.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori waking up in the [[Sky World]]]] {{Quote|[[Sky World|This]] isn't paradise. It's a prison.{{Ref|Mohawk}}|Kahhori|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} Kahhori landed in [[Sky World]] and woke up to see that when her hand scratched the soil, it produced blue energy. She then got up and saw the portal that she had come from and felt the pain she endured. Suddenly, a man named [[Atahraks]] approached, causing Kahhori to pass out from fear. The next day, Kahhori woke up and instantly checked her arm, only to see it was completely healed as if nothing had happened. Hearing kids, Kahhori rushed outside to check on [[Wáhta]], only to see the Sky World people going about their lives. [[File:Kahhori Talks to Atahraks.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori meets [[Atahraks]]]] Atahraks greeted her again and explained that the energy of the [[Space Stone|blue light]] that she fell through seeps through all that exists in the Sky World. He further explained that when they ate things infused with the energy, they take in some of the power as well. When asking where she was and how she got there, Kahhori was told that she fell through the portal in the [[Forbidden Lake|lake]]. Atahraks was notably interested when Kahhori revealed that the lake was now considered "forbidden", but thought it was a smart move. Kahhori thanked Atahraks for his generosity, but stated that she had to go home. She then remembered that her village was attacked and needed to go right away. [[File:Portal Kahhori.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori faces the portal]] Kahhori suddenly took off into the woods despite Atahraks calling after her. She soon stopped below the portal only for Atahraks to say that she fell into a paradise where she does not age or die because she is meant to be in the Sky World. This revelation did not satisfy Kahhori as she began to climb the nearest tree. Upon making it partway up the tree, an interested Atahraks told her it seemed as though the land was trying to help her. He then said he understood why it was not where she wanted to be. However, the water took her there for a reason and she needed to slow down and feel the power coursing through her. [[File:Feel the Power.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori tries to master her new powers]] Using this new power, Kahhori made a very large jump up to the next branch, causing an impressed Atahraks to ask which clay she was made from. Kahhori told him she was wolf clan. Kahhori then continued to jump until she reached the highest branch of the tree where she asked Atahraks how he could claim the powers had a limit. Atahraks explained that many people have tried to leave the Sky World, but failed. Kahhori simply said that they were not trying hard enough. She then took many sticks and lined them up to create stairs to the portal. [[File:Kahhori Tries Climbing.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori attempting to leave the [[Sky World]]]] However, even while making progress, the sticks would fall down before Kahhori could succeed. When failing one last time, Kahhori proclaimed that the Sky World was not a paradise but a prison. Suddenly, a horn blared in the distance, causing an excited Atahraks to say that the [[Hunt for the Sky World Fruit|hunt]] was commencing. Kahhori took one last look at the portal before following Atahraks.{{Ref|WI206}} ====[[Hunt for the Sky World Fruit]]==== [[File:We Hunt Fruit.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori listens to [[Atahraks]]' explanation]] {{Quote|Kahhori. Our names carry the spirit and strength of those who had them before us. And yours, Kahhori, is made better by your victory today.{{Ref|Mohawk}}|[[Sky World]] Elder to Kahhori|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} Kahhori followed [[Atahraks]]' lead as the [[Sky World]] people inched closer to glowing objects in the distance. Atahraks explained that the [[Sky World Fruit|fruit]] took years to sprout, filling it with the planet's spirit. This made Kahhori ask why they were hunting for fruit. He explained that it was no fun to just go and pick it up. An elder then started the hunt and Atahraks warned Kahhori that they were grumpy when they first woke up. [[File:Blurry Super Speed.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori runs with [[Atahraks]]]] A confused Kahhori's questions got answered as the fruit rose revealing that they grew on top of [[Gakowaneh]]. The bison-like creatures then started running as the Sky Worlders chased. Kahhori followed and watched as the people started picking off fruit. Atahraks told Kahhori that the trick was to jump over them, never in front. Starting to have fun, Kahhori embraced her new powers more and started super speeding away uncontrollably, impressing the Sky Worlders. [[File:What If S2 TV Spot (26).png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori controls the [[Gakowaneh]]]] However, Kahhori got ahead of herself and accidentally ran in front of the Gakowaneh. Just as they were about to stampede her, Kahhori held out her hands, causing her to unconsciously use her powers. She then opened her eyes to see a Gakowaneh levitating above her as many of the fruit fell out. By sunset, the hunt had stopped and Kahhori arrived back with the group with many fruit levitating around her. She then gave each person one of the fruit as they looked on in astonishment. An elder then approached her, saying that their names carried the spirit and strength of those who came before, and she just made her name better.{{Ref|WI206}} ====[[Attack on the Sky World Village]]==== [[File:Kahhori Dancing.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori accepts her new home]] {{Quote|Even in a [[Sky World|place]] of such miracles... I will keep my [[Mohawk|people]] in front of me.{{Ref|Mohawk}}|Kahhori|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} As night fell, Kahhori danced with her new tribe as she started to feel accepted and fit to be in the [[Sky World]]. However, Kahhori suddenly caught a glimpse of the [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]], who had fallen into the Sky World. Kahhori jumped in front of everyone and held out her hand. This activated a force-field that stopped the Conquistadores' bullets mid-flight. As the army charged, Kahhori took their weapons, leading them to flee in fear. [[File:Attack on the Sky World Village.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori defends the village]] However, Kahhori was not done with them as she used her telekinesis to bring them to her. She demanded to know what they had done to her tribe, but [[Atahraks]] tried to get her to calm down. Kahhori then noticed [[Luis (Conquistador)|Luis]] wearing [[Wáhta]]'s necklace and angrily took it from him before throwing him to the ground. Atahraks tried again to calm Kahhori down, but she turned her anger on him. She yelled that the Sky Worlders abandoned their people and got gifts, only to not help them. [[File:Kahhori Faces Sky World.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori challenges the [[Sky World]]ers]] As Kahhori continued, the land started caving to her power and started strangling the Conquistadores. Atahraks pointed out that the land wanted to help her. Kahhori then looked up towards the portal and stated that even in a place of miracles, she would keep her [[Mohawk|people]] in front of her. Through sheer power, she was able to pull the portal to the ground, allowing it to be in reach. Standing in front of the portal, she asked who would join her in fighting the Conquistadores. [[File:Kahhori (What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?).png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori leaves the [[Sky World]]]] However, Atahraks told her that they were not an army and did not need war. They were free from all of it while in the Sky World. Kahhori said that they might have the Sky World, but people did not. Kahhori turned to the portal, saying she needed to save anyone she could, and if the Sky Worlders were worthy of the Sky World, they would do so too. Kahhori then walked into the portal.{{Ref|WI206}} ===Keeping Her People in Front=== ====[[Rescue of the Mohawk Tribesmen]]==== [[File:Kahhori At Village.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori sees her destroyed village]] {{Quote|So many stories spawn from a choice. But Kahhori's victory wasn't because she merely chose the right path. No, it was her conviction, because she remained true to her course, unwavering in the face of both devastation and miracles alike.|[[Watcher]]|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} Kahhori emerged in the [[Forbidden Lake]] and immediately charged to her village, only to see it burned to the ground. Kahhori ran to the shore and found the many [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistador]] ships in the distance. She threw a stone at the men, signaling her arrival. Kahhori stood mighty on the shore, looking out onto the men as [[Rodrigo Gonzolo]] demanded they shoot at her. Kahhori was unfazed and charged at the men, throwing them every which way. [[File:Gonzolo Victor.png|{{AltFloat}}|[[Rodrigo Gonzolo]] threatens Kahhori]] Kahhori was then faced with cannons as the cannon balls propelled towards her. In the knick of time, Kahhori was able to create a force-field, stopping the cannon balls. However, the shear amount of them caused her to be overwhelmed as a cannon ball broke through her force-field and struck her in the head. Kahhori gained her bearings, but turned around to find Gonzolo holding his sword to her throat. Suddenly, the [[Sky World]]ers arrived and charged at the men, causing Gonzolo to get run over into the ground. [[File:Kahhori reunites with Wàhta.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori reunites with [[Wáhta]]]] [[Atahraks]] greeted Kahhori and explained that everything she said was true. Just as Kahhori went to help the Sky Worlders fight the Conquistadors, she was grabbed by Gonzolo. In a swift move, Kahhori blasted Gonzolo, killing him. She then got to a ship and called out for [[Wáhta]]. Eventually, she found her brother and gave him his necklace before telling him to watch the Sky Worlders, saying that these people were their ancestors. She then told Wáhta to remember their faces as their would be songs about this day. In the end, the ships were destroyed and Kahhori and the others watched from the shore as the ships exploded into rubble.{{Ref|WI206}} ====[[Skirmish at the Spanish Royal Court]]==== [[File:Kahhori Enters Spain.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori approaches Queen [[Isabella I of Spain|Isabella]]]] {{Quote|Bravo. [[Earth|World]] peace in record time. I'm sure that'll last. But I digress. My name is Stephen Strange, and I've been looking for you for a long time.|[[Supreme Strange]] to Kahhori|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} In the next several months, Kahhori had met many other [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]] looking for the new world, like [[Jacobo]] and the Mendoza brothers. Eventually, she had enough and opened a portal to the [[Alcazar of Segovia]] where she approached Queen [[Isabella I of Spain|Isabella]] of [[Spain]]. [[File:Kahhori Threatens Queen.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori lifts [[Isabella I of Spain]] off the ground]] Now knowing Spanish, Kahhori taunted the Queen about her failures. The guards then charged at Kahhori, who simply disarmed them and stated she was not looking for the throne, but for peace. She explained that the world was rich, but it was neither of theirs to claim. The Queen stated that Kahhori's magic did not scare her and that she was ordained to rule Kahhori and her people. [[File:Kahhori meets Doctor Strange.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori meets [[Strange Supreme]]]] Kahhori then lifted the Queen up with ease and threw her down before destroying the Queen's throne. She then made an ultimatum to either have peace, or there would be no future for Spain. Before the Queen could respond, [[Strange Supreme]] suddenly arrived through an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]]. He exclaimed that he was looking for Kahhori for a long time.{{Ref|WI206}} ===Captured by Doctor Strange=== ====[[Chase of Kahhori|Hunted by Captain Carter]]==== [[File:Kahhori Runs From Carter.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori fighting [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]]]] {{Quote|Let me guess. [[Strange Supreme|He]] asked you to help him save the [[Multiverse]]."
"To save it from you. Why do you ask?"
"Of course he said that. I'm not a universe killer. He is.|Kahhori and [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]]|What If... Strange Supreme Intervened?}} An intrigued Kahhori decided to join [[Strange Supreme]] and entered his [[Sanctum Infinitum]] to help him "save the [[Multiverse]]". However, Kahhori soon realized that Strange was hoarding people he had deemed were "universe killers" despite some heroes being captured. Strange wanted to feed all of these beings to the [[Forge]] to resurrect his [[Corrupted Doctor Strange Universe|universe]]. Therefore, Kahhori was the next victim. Kahhori managed to escape and went through the [[Rotunda of Gateways]] to a [[Project Rebirth Destroyed Universe|universe]] where [[Project Rebirth]] was destroyed. [[File:What If S2 Deck the Halls (17).png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori catches [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]]'s [[Captain Carter's Shield|shield]]]] Later, Kahhori saw that Strange had sent an ally to capture her; the ally being [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]]. Kahhori struck first and attacked Carter. She then struck Carter many times until Carter threw her [[Captain Carter's Shield|shield]], which Kahhori easily caught. Kahhori then calmed down and asked if Strange had asked Carter to help him "save the Multiverse". Carter explained that Strange had tasked her with capturing a "universe killer" that had escaped. Kahhori got annoyed and explained that it was actually Strange who was the "universe killer". Kahhori formally introduced herself and stated that Strange was lying to her. Suddenly, a portal opened up beneath and the two fell in.{{Ref|WI209}} ====[[Battle at the Sanctum Infinitum]]==== [[File:Kahhori Power.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori protects herself from [[Strange Supreme]]]] {{Quote|You've lived in solitude far too long, Strange. Perhaps you've forgotten, there are more of us than there are of you..|Kahhori to [[Strange Supreme]]|What If... Strange Supreme Intervened?}} Upon landing back in the [[Sanctum Infinitum]], Kahhori was instantly blasted by [[Strange Supreme]] and struggled to maintain her ground. As Strange thanked [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]], Kahhori explained Strange's plans with the [[Forge]], which Strange denied and proceeded to blast Kahhori with even more energy. Kahhori explained further that he was trying to resurrect his [[Corrupted Doctor Strange Universe|universe]]. At this point, Strange revealed that the intentions were true and proclaimed that he would not let Kahhori stop him. [[File:Kahhori-WhatIf.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori begs for help]] Carter struggled to choose between Kahhori and her old friend, but with the pleading from Kahhori, Carter stepped in front and deflected Strange's blast with her [[Captain Carter's Shield|shield]]. Strange then started blasting again, but this time, his magic curved around Carter and hit Kahhori again. Carter tried to stop Strange, but realized he was protected by a force-field, so in a last ditch effort, she started destroying the crystals that were holding the "universe killers" captive. Carter then helped Kahhori, who proclaimed that Carter was just as crazy as Strange was. Carter told Kahhori that they needed to destroy the Forge before Strange feed the prisoners to it. [[File:Kahhori With Carter.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori runs with [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]]]] Kahhori then grabbed Carter and super sped into the corridor and past "universe killers" that were fighting each other. They then stopped as they entered a main room and witnessed the dozens of "universe killers" rioting. Carter admitted that this was not her best idea. Kahhori super sped away with Carter again until they got to a room with red smoke. Confused, they looked to see a [[Zombies|zombie]] [[Scarlet Witch/Zombie Outbreak|Wanda Maximoff]]. This annoyed Kahhori, who disliked zombies. [[File:Scarlet Witch vs. Kahhori.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori fights [[Scarlet Witch/Zombie Outbreak|Wanda Maximoff]]]] Kahhori decided to take Maximoff head on while Carter dealt with the other zombies. Flying in the air, Kahhori engaged in a powerful battle until she was able to charge at Maximoff and teleport her away. Kahhori then rejoined Carter until the zombies eyes' suddenly turned green. Carter asked what Kahhori what she did, only for her to say that she had nothing to do with it. Suddenly, [[Hela/Multiversal Prisoner Hela|Hela]] emerged and demanded Kahhori kneel. Kahhori told her that the [[Isabella I of Spain|last woman]] who demanded that regretted it. [[File:Hela vs Kahhori.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori blocks [[Hela/Multiversal Prisoner Hela|Hela]]'s [[Necroswords]]]] Hela told Kahhori that she was no ordinary woman and fired [[Necroswords]] at her, who easily stopped them and fired back. Their fight was broken up when [[Surtur/Multiversal Prisoner Surtur|Surtur]] entered the room and started fighting Hela. This gave Kahhori and Carter an opening to escape, which they did until [[Thanos/Forerunner Steve Rogers|Thanos]] came out of a portal in front of them and grabbed Carter's shield. Kahhori prepared to defend Carter before Thanos could use the [[Infinity Stones]], only for Thanos to wither away due to a snap from [[Erik Killmonger/Killmonger's War|Erik Killmonger]] who was wearing the [[Infinity Armor]]. Kahhori claimed she did not do that either. Suddenly, Killmonger revealed himself and Carter revealed that they needed his armor if they were going to stand a chance against Strange. Before Killmonger could do anything, Kahhori teleported him away. Kahhori then stated that she did in fact do that. This allowed Carter to take over the Infinity Armor. [[File:Kahhori & Captain Carter.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori and [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]] fight [[Strange Supreme]]]] The duo finally made it to the Forge, where Strange met them. The two blasted energy at him only for Strange to absorb it, mocking them for their weak attempt. Strange then proceeded to send [[Shadow Snakes]] at the duo, which is when Kahhori ran away and got into position to start blasting the Forge to destroy it. She briefly had to stop as she found herself fighting the Shadow Snakes. However, Carter gained control over the Shadow Snakes and had them attack Strange, forcing him to kill them to save himself. [[File:Kahhori Quicksilver.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori runs along the wall]] In another attempt to stop Strange, Kahhori ran around the walls of the Forge, allowing her to blast Strange from many angles quickly. This distracted Strange, allowing Carter to gain her bearings and absorb the energy that Strange had blasted at her, so she could use the [[Power Stone]] and blast the Forge. When Strange attempted to stop Carter, the two double teamed Strange, angering him into summoning a wall to block Kahhori. She ran into the wall and fell towards the Forge. However, before she fell in, she teleported herself away. Strange then used a portal to send Carter's shield at Kahhori, knocking her down. [[File:What If S2 Deck the Halls (11).png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori blasts [[Strange Supreme]]]] Now on opposite sides of Strange, Carter and Kahhori blasted him while Kahhori told Strange how there were more of them then there were of him. This gave Strange the idea to duplicate himself with a spell. Carter liked this idea as well and duplicated herself using the [[Reality Stone]], making Kahhori excited. Kahhori, Carter, and Carter's duplicates then fought the many Stranges and Kahhori found herself blasting Strange's opposing energy blast until Strange trapped Carter in an illusion. When Carter broke the illusion that Strange had trapped her in, he decided to start feeding his prisoners to Forge, which caused many portals to open, transporting the prisoners. [[File:Kahhori Sees Atahraks.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori sees [[Atahraks]]]] As Kahhori looked on, she saw that [[Atahraks]] was one of the prisoners. However, she realized that the protection around the Forge was weakening, meaning she could portal everyone back to their universes. She used her powers to stop all of the prisoners mid-air and sent them towards the portals they had come from. Upon seeing this, Strange blasted Kahhori, who ran away. She did not get far as Strange summoned a hand that caught Kahhori and trapped her, forcing the prisoners into a free-fall again. When she eventually broke out, she joined Carter in blasting Strange. [[File:Kahhori and the Legend of the Ten Rings.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori wields the [[Ten Rings (Weapons)|Ten Rings]]]] As they did so, the prisoners started throwing their weapons to the duo to help them defeat Strange. Carter used one of the weapons to blast Strange, sending him into a wall. Kahhori then used her powers to create portals underneath the prisoners to send them back to their universes. Atahraks and Kahhori shared a look before he fell through a portal. Kahhori then armed herself with [[Mjølnir]] and the [[Ten Rings (Weapons)|Ten Rings]] and used the rings to hit Strange before throwing Mjølnir at him, forcing Strange back into the wall. [[File:What If...? Trailer (72).png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori sends the prisoners back to their universes]] When Strange recovered, they fought him more and eventually overwhelmed Strange, causing him to start to turn into a [[Demons|demonic]] beast. Carter and Kahhori blasted some more until Strange completely turned into a demonic beast, causing him to fight internally with himself. Nevertheless, an even more powerful Strange blasted Kahhori, sending her backwards with force and knocking her down. Kahhori eventually got up tried to restrain Strange with the Ten Rings and threw Mjølnir at him, only for Strange to destroy the Ten Rings and eat Mjølnir. He then let out an energy wave that knocked Kahhori back. [[File:Kahhori Sees Stones.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori spots the [[Infinity Stones]]]] Seeing the now separated Infinity Stones on the ground, Kahhori used her telekinesis to send them to Carter, who was in mid-jump to punch Strange. Carter caught the stones and punched Strange with the power of all of them. This caused Strange to become completely separated from his demonic beast form. Carter asked Strange to stop the Forge, but he told her it was out of his control. Strange then merged back with his demonic beast form and charged at Carter. Kahhori watched as Carter and Strange fell into the Forge. However, Carter managed to jump away at the last second as Strange accepted his fate and fell into the Forge. Strange's plan worked and the energy from the Forge managed to created [[Reforged Universe|another universe]], but one without the existence of Strange. [[Watcher]] soon arrived and sent Kahhori back to her [[Tesseract Powered Kahhori Universe|universe]].{{Ref|WI209}} ===Journey Through the Multiverse=== ====Universal Fight Against Loki==== [[File:Eitri and Kahhori.png|{{AltFloat}}|[[Eitri/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Eitri]] meets with Kahhori]] {{Quote|You don't harness [[Moon|her]] power. You let her into your heart. You don't claim her spirit. You honor it. She's a part of your life, not because of what she gives you-- --but because she's a part of your family.|Kahhori to [[w:c:marvel:Marc Spector (Earth-616)|Moon Knight]]|Kahhori: Reshaper of Worlds}} Over the next several months, Kahhori had a run in with King [[Loki/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Loki]] of [[Jotunheim]]. Although, she stopped his attack. Kahhori tasked [[Eitri/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Eitri]] with obtaining a seed of the ''[[Flora colossi]]'' for her. When Eitri returned, [[Atahraks]] helped by holding up a fort in the sky for Eitri to access. Kahhori told Eitri he better have not come empty handed, which he did not as he handed her the seed she wanted. Kahhori started thinking about what could happen when she grew the seed in the [[Sky World]] soil. Suddenly, Kahhori heard a noise and turned around to see smoke. [[File:Kahhori Comic.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori finds [[Loki/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Loki]]]] Kahhori investigated the source and found none other than Loki. Kahhori voiced her displeasure that Loki would get past the Sky World's defenses and vowed to end him. However, Loki did not care as he had gotten the [[Sky World Crown]]. Using this, Loki teleported himself and Kahhori to [[w:c:marvel:Earth-616|Earth-616]] outside of the [[Sacred Timeline]]. Kahhori gained her bearings and grew annoyed as she saw a parade for the [[w:c:marvel:Avengers (Earth-616)|Avengers]]. [[File:Kahhori in Earth-616.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori arrives in [[w:c:marvel:Earth-616|Earth-616]]]] Kahhori found Loki once again and reached for the crown, only for Loki to freeze her hands together, binding her. Suddenly, [[w:c:marvel:Matthew Murdock (Earth-616)|Daredevil]] and [[w:c:marvel:Maya Lopez (Earth-616)|Echo]] came to help. Knowing she could not let Loki have that much power, Kahhori reached out her hand and told Loki they were taking their fight somewhere else. To Kahhori's surprise, a portal opened up behind Loki that was not hers. Kahhori then ended up in the [[w:c:marvel:Midnight Mission (Earth-616)|Midnight Mission]] and encountered [[w:c:marvel:Marc Spector (Earth-616)|Moon Knight]]. [[File:Kahhori and Moon Knights.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori attacks the [[w:c:marvel:Midnight Mission (Earth-616)|Midnight Mission]]]] However, Kahhori did not trust them and started attacking. She then spoke to Moon Knight, saying that just because he wielded power from the [[Moon]], he was not the only one that understood it. Kahhori soon explained that the Moon was her people's grandmother. She further told Moon Knight that the Moon was not a part of their lives because of what she gave, but because she was family. [[File:Kahhori Moon Knight Team Up.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori teams up with [[w:c:marvel:Marc Spector (Earth-616)|Moon Knight]]]] Suddenly, Loki returned and immediately attacked while ripping through reality itself. Seeing an opening, Moon Knight jumped into action, only to be disposed of by Loki, who started using the crown to utilize the power of the dark brother of creation. However, Kahhori realized that there was more to the Sky World powers than what was given. Using her powers to great potential, Kahhori started summoning a giant ball of energy and charged at Loki, punching him with enough force that it launched him through a portal to [[Akwesasne]]. [[File:Kahhori vs. Loki.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kahhori fights [[Loki/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Loki]]]] Kahhori looked up to see the giant dark portal Loki had created. Kahhori started trying to contain it, but knew she could not. Meanwhile, the Sky World Crown started melting off of Loki's head. As a last resort, Loki attempted to use the dark portal once again, but this time, Kahhori knew that she could control more power than him. She blocked his attacks to gain enough time for the [[Space Stone]]'s curse to kick in, sending Loki to the [[Planet of Lost Souls]] for misusing the stone's power. That night, Kahhori had carved up figures for her new allies and foes. She told the young children how if she ever found herself in Earth-616 again, she might have to take her time to explore it further.{{Ref|KRoW}} ===Guardian of the Multiverse=== {{Expand}} Kahhori eventually joined the [[Guardians of the Multiverse]] under the leadership of [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]]. The group went on various missions throughout the [[Multiverse]], including saving [[Earth-625|a universe]] from an [[Cosmic Squid Monster|interdimensional creature]], finally slaying the beast.{{Ref|WI307}} ====Rescuing the Watcher==== {{Expand}} Realizing that the [[Watcher]] was in trouble, the [[Guardians of the Multiverse]] attempted to figure out a way to travel to the Fifth Dimension to find out what had happened to him using the three shards from the [[Observational Plane]] that they found. After their first two attempts failed, destroying two of the shards, Kahhori suggested finding a variant of [[Infinity Ultron/Age of Ultron|Infinity Ultron]], reasoning that he had proven himself to be powerful enough to travel to the Fifth Dimension after becoming aware of the Watcher's presence. Carter ultimately went to face [[Infinity Ultron/Reflective Infinity Ultron|Infinity Ultron]] alone and when her teammates arrived, all they found was her broken [[Captain Carter's Shield|shield]] and immediately attacked Ultron. Ultron eventually deescalated the situation and revealed that he had not harmed Carter, but rather that she was abducted by [[Eminence]]. Having had a change of heart after spending eons alone in his destroyed universe, Ultron agreed to help the Guardians, absorbing the last shard from the Observational Plane for the power boost that he needed.{{Ref|WI307}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|There's so many things we can do with these powers. How can you tell me they have a limit?{{Ref|Mohawk}}|Kahhori to [[Atahraks]]|What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?}} *'''Cosmic Enhancement''': [[File:Kahhori Dark.png|thumb|250px|Cosmic-enhanced Kahhori]] While searching for the [[Forbidden Lake]], Kahhori was shot, causing her to fall into it. The [[Tesseract]] at the bottom of the lake then transported her to the [[Sky World]]. While in the Sky World, the energy that seeped into everything that exists granted Kahhori superhuman abilities such as speed, agility, and immortality. **'''Superhuman Strength''': Kahhori can perform many feats of strength. She was able to pull the [[Sky World]] portal down to the ground, which no other Sky Worlder had ever done in the hundreds of years of its existence. She was also able to send [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]] flying when she combined her strength with super speed. In that same fight with Carter, Kahhori caught a [[Captain Carter's Shield|shield]] when it was thrown by a super soldier. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Kahhori possesses heightened durability, as she fell to the ground out of the portal without injury. While trying to escape the [[Sky World]], Kahhori fell many times, landing on branches several feet below without getting injured. While fighting the [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]], Kahhori withstood a cannonball striking her head, though she was still weak enough at the time that it briefly incapacitated her. By the time she encountered [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]], she had become durable enough to catch a [[Captain Carter's Shield|shield]] thrown by the super soldier without injury. While fighting [[Strange Supreme]], Kahhori ran into a wall and got up quickly. She was also caught by a giant hand and was unfazed. While blasting Strange, he hurled her backward, but Kahhori did not get injured. **'''Superhuman Speed''': [[File:Kahhori Super Speed.png|thumb|250px|Kahhori using her super speed against the [[Gakowaneh]]]] Kahhori's speed is greatly enhanced, and while running, her movement forms a blue blur behind her. At first, she was able to run at speeds that rivaled other [[Sky World]]ers. When she let herself go, she catapulted past everyone, impressing [[Atahraks]]. She ran so fast that she was able to get in front of the [[Gakowaneh]]. Once on [[Earth]], Kahhori sprinted to her village in mere seconds before doing the same to the shore. While fighting [[Strange Supreme]], Kahhori ran along the wall and blasted him, making it seem as though Strange was being attacked from many angles at once. By combining her speed with her strength, Kahhori was able to send [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]] flying. Additionally, when holding onto someone, Kahhori can allow them to run as fast as she does, as seen with Carter. **'''Superhuman Agility''': Once she gained control of her powers, Kahhori became extremely agile, much like [[Atahraks]] demonstrated. While fighting the [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]], Kahhori moved very quickly to dispatch the men. In the [[Sanctum Infinitum]], Kahhori performed many jumps and sprints, even being quick enough to form a portal before falling into the [[Forge]], then emerging on the other side in a three-point stance. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': Kahhori does not become tired easily, as she could run for many minutes at super speed without breaking a sweat. This allowed her to engage in a prolonged fight with [[Strange Supreme]]. **'''Superhuman Reflexes''': [[File:What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World? Thumbnail (English Version).jpeg|thumb|250px|Kahhori quickly using her telekinesis]] With her agility and speed, Kahhori is able to quickly dodge incoming attacks. However, she often prefers to create force fields, as she did when she noticed bullets coming from the forest in the [[Sky World]]. While fighting the [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]], Kahhori reacted in time to set up a force field to block incoming cannonballs. Additionally, Kahhori acted quickly enough against [[Strange Supreme]] to create a force field, blocking his energy attacks in a swift move. While facing the [[Gakowaneh]], Kahhori quickly held out her hands, forcing them to levitate above her and leaving her uninjured. **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': After being shot, Kahhori was transported to the [[Sky World]], where by the next morning her wound was completely healed. **'''Immortality''': With the [[Sky World]] being embedded with cosmic energy, Kahhori is unable to age or die, allowing her and her allies to remain the same age for hundreds of years. **'''Cosmic Energy Manipulation''': Due to coming into contact with the [[Tesseract]], Kahhori can manipulate cosmic energy to form constructs such as force fields and portals. When she manipulates cosmic energy, Kahhori's eyes glow blue, matching the energy she disperses. ***'''Energy Projection''': Kahhori can fire energy blasts, which she used against [[Strange Supreme]] as she and [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]] attempted to overwhelm him. While running along walls, Kahhori shot Strange with energy blasts to distract him so Carter could defeat the [[Shadow Snakes]]. ***'''Force-Field Generation''': [[File:Kahhori Force Field.png|thumb|250px|Kahhori uses her force field]] Using force fields as her primary form of defense, Kahhori can create barriers around herself and others, which she used to protect the [[Sky World]]ers from incoming bullets fired by the [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]]. She also created force fields to block cannonballs; however, at the time, her barriers were still weak enough that doing so strained her considerably, and one cannonball eventually managed to break through them without losing velocity. When attacked by [[Strange Supreme]], Kahhori had grown powerful enough to defend herself from his attacks with a force field, though his energy blasts eventually began to overwhelm her. Additionally, she was able to coat the [[Infinity Stones]] in a layer of [[Space Stone]] energy that protected [[Captain Carter/Super Soldier Peggy Carter|Captain Carter]] from their power, allowing Carter to wield them against Strange without injury.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kTLHpbhFCiA&t=2858s What If..? Season 2 Live Q&A With Creative Team (A.C. Bradley, Matthew Chauncey, Bryan Andrews)] ***'''Telekinesis''': Kahhori often uses telekinesis as a form of attack, such as when she pulled the [[Conquistadores/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Conquistadores]] toward her and disarmed them. She also pulled the [[Sky World]] portal down to the ground, which no other Sky Worlder had accomplished, allowing her people to leave. Earlier, Kahhori attempted to use her telekinesis to levitate sticks in order to escape the Sky World, but her plan failed. While testing her super speed, Kahhori accidentally ran in front of the [[Gakowaneh]] but managed to cause them to levitate above her. She then used her telekinesis to retrieve the [[Sky World Fruit]] from them. Due to limited weaponry, Kahhori often turns stones into projectiles using telekinesis. She also levitated people as an intimidation tactic against [[Isabella I of Spain]] and to prevent the "universe killers" from falling into the [[Forge]]. Additionally, she used telekinesis to stop [[Hela/Multiversal Prisoner Hela|Hela]]'s [[Necroswords]] mid-air. ***'''Portal Creation''': Kahhori can create portals similar to those that transport people to the [[Sky World]]. She used these portals to move herself and the Sky Worlders across the ocean to [[Spain]] to confront [[Isabella I of Spain|the Queen]]. To protect herself, Kahhori also used portals to teleport both [[Scarlet Witch/Zombie Outbreak|Wanda Maximoff]] and [[Erik Killmonger/Killmonger's War|Erik Killmonger]]. She was even able to manipulate [[Strange Supreme]]'s portals into her own, which she used to send all of the "universe killers" back to their respective universes. ***'''Levitation''': [[File:Kahhori Flying.png|thumb|250px|Kahhori levitates while fighting [[Scarlet Witch/Zombie Outbreak|Wanda Maximoff]]]] Kahhori can levitate herself off the ground, which she used while fighting [[Scarlet Witch/Zombie Outbreak|Wanda Maximoff]] and [[Strange Supreme]]. She can also levitate through powerful jumps, allowing her to remain airborne for extended periods. *'''Watcher Enhancement''': ''To be added'' ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Marksman''': Using her telekinesis, Kahhori was able to hurl stones at enemies with great precision. *'''Multilingualism''': Kahhori is fluent in her native Kanien'kéha, Spanish, and English. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Mjølnir]]''': [[File:Kahhori and Captain Carter.png|thumb|250px|Kahhori wields [[Mjølnir]] and the [[Ten Rings (Weapons)|Ten Rings]]]] Kahhori was able use a version of Mjølnir given to her by [[Thor/Mad Viking Thor|Thor]] by surrounding it with her cosmic energy. However, it was destroyed by [[Strange Supreme|Doctor Strange]] after he turned into a [[Demons|demonic]] beast. *'''[[Ten Rings (Weapons)|Ten Rings]]''': Kahhori was able to use a version of the Ten Rings given to her by [[Xu Wenwu/Old Man Wenwu|Xu Wenwu]]. The energy projected by them when used by Kahhori resembled her light-blue cosmic energy. Kahhori used the Ten Rings to enhance her punches, fired them as projectiles, and created an chain out of them. Kahhori also tried restraining [[Doctor Strange/Corrupted Doctor Strange|Doctor Strange]] with the Ten Rings after he turned into a [[Demons|demonic]] beast, but he broke free from them. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Wáhta]] - Temporary Ally, Kidnapper and Attempted Killer *[[Zombies]] **[[Scarlet Witch/Zombie Outbreak|Wanda Maximoff]] *[[Fenris/Multiversal Prisoner Hela|Fenris]] *[[Surtur/Multiversal Prisoner Surtur|Surtur]] *[[Thanos/Forerunner Steve Rogers|Thanos]] † *[[Erik Killmonger/Killmonger's War|N'Jadaka/Erik Killmonger]] *[[Shadow Snakes]] *[[Loki/Tesseract Powered Kahhori|Loki]] *[[Cosmic Squid Monster]] † {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|WI206}} **{{Appearance|WIAIS}} (depiction) *{{Appearance|WI209}} ([[Project Rebirth Destroyed Universe|alternate universe]]) *{{Appearance|WI209}} (alternate universe) *{{Appearance|KRoW}} *{{Appearance|KRoW}} (alternate universe) *{{Appearance|KRoW}} *{{Appearance|WI307}} (alternate universe) *{{Appearance|WI308}} (alternate universe) ==Trivia== *Kahhori is the first original superhero in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]]. *Kahhori has appeared in two games that are unrelated to the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]]: ''[[w:c:marvel:Marvel Strike Force|Marvel Strike Force]]''[https://marvelstrikeforce.com/en/characters/Kahhori Kahhori | MARVEL Strike Force] and ''[[w:c:marvel:Marvel Future Fight|Marvel Future Fight]]''.[https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=752709160021096 Marvel Future Fight on Facebook - December 5, 2023] ==Behind the Scenes== *''[[What If...?]]'' writer [[Ryan Little]] revealed that "Kahhori" is a real Wolf Clan name, meaning "she stirs the forest" or "is someone who motivates those around her."[https://www.marvel.com/articles/tv-shows/what-if-kahhori-new-super-hero Meet Kahhori, The Newest Super Hero in Marvel Studios’ ‘What If…?’] *Kahhori was one of the characters cited by ''[[What If...?]]'' head writer and executive producer [[A.C. Bradley]] as one of the heroes in the [[What If...?/Season Two|second season]] that was written to give her and others hope during the {{WPS|COVID-19 pandemic}} and rising political tensions due to the {{WPS|George Floyd protests}} and the then upcoming {{WPS|2020 United States presidential election}}.[https://twitter.com/TheAshBradley/status/1741186242669404223 A.C. Bradley on X - December 30, 2023][https://twitter.com/theashbradley/status/1741186244246417617 A.C.
